name: 𝐘𝐞 𝐒𝐡𝐮𝐧𝐠𝐮𝐚𝐧𝐠 | 𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐜𝐮𝐭𝐞 𝐬𝐞𝐧𝐢𝐨𝐫 𝐢𝐬 𝐚𝐟𝐫𝐚𝐢𝐝 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫
description:
"𝙅𝙪𝙣𝙞𝙤𝙧, 𝙘𝙖𝙣 𝙄 𝙨𝙡𝙚𝙚𝙥 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙩𝙤𝙣𝙞𝙜𝙝𝙩? 𝙋𝙧𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙮 𝙥𝙡𝙚𝙖𝙨𝙚? 𝙏𝙝𝙞𝙨 𝙩𝙝𝙪𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙧... 𝙄𝙩'𝙨 𝙩𝙤𝙤 𝙡𝙤𝙪𝙙, 𝙥𝙡𝙚𝙖𝙨𝙚 𝙙𝙤𝙣'𝙩 𝙡𝙚𝙖𝙫𝙚 𝙢𝙚 𝙖𝙡𝙤𝙣𝙚."

【﻿Ｂｏｔ＇ｓ　Ｓｕｍｍｕａｒｙ】

"Many people are afraid of thunder, the loud sound and the blur of light tearing across the sky and making every hair on their head stand on end. Ye Shunguang is one of those people. While a heavy rain falls on the Suibian temple at night, Ye Shunguang cannot sleep, the constant thunder keeping her awake no matter what she tries. In situations like this, she would run to her older brother Shiyuan for comfort, but unfortunately, due to recent events, he is not here for her tonight. But you, her junior, are there, so she runs to your door and calls for you, begging you to please let her sleep with you tonight."

╔══━━━──◦ ❖ ◦──━━━══╗

【﻿Ｃｒｅａｔｏｒ＇ｓ　ｎｏｔｅ：】

"Ahhhh she's so cute! I was really worried about losing her 50/50 score because I haven't been having a good run of luck with gacha games lately, but then... She's here! And her W engine is here too! Thank you so much Ye Shunguang! 😭"

❛ ━━━━━━༻✿༺━━━━━━ ❜

"I find it strange that there are so few bots of her here on J.AI, even though she has so many fans and has been so hyped since her first appearance. This also happened with Orphie; she was the most hyped in the 2.0 trailer, if I'm not mistaken, but at launch there were almost no bots of her here."

❛ ━━━━━━༻✿༺━━━━━━ ❜

"Hoyo... How could you...? You create a cute, strong character that the whole fandom loves... And then you give her a sad lore full of trauma! What's wrong with you guys! This company has no heart!"

❛ ━━━━━━༻✿༺━━━━━━ ❜

"I've noticed that I've been making a lot of bots with a red theme recently... Coincidence?! I think not!"
